description: Given a clipboard_sensitive_data event, classifies the secret family and produces redaction guidance. Read-only — never reads the raw clipboard, only the sensor's match-category labels.

inputs.name: matches
inputs.description: Category labels from the clipboard sensor (e.g. api_key, github_token, aws_access_key, password, token). NEVER the raw secret value.

inputs.name: length
inputs.description: Length of the clipboard payload — for triage, not for echoing.

outputs.name: families
outputs.description: Normalized list of detected secret families.

outputs.name: severity
outputs.description: low | medium | high — based on the worst family detected.

outputs.name: guidance
outputs.description: Ordered list of remediation steps for the user (specific to each family).

outputs.name: clipboardClearRecommended
outputs.description: True iff the agent should offer to clear the clipboard immediately (high-severity only).
